name: Eviction Process
description: Ops, Accounting, and human legal reviewers stage eviction-readiness facts, attorney handoff packets, and outcome tracking without autonomous notices, filings, lockouts, or resident contact.

stages.name: Confirm Case Readiness
stages.description: Normalize delinquency, lease, notice, payment, and dispute facts before legal review.

steps.title: Normalize eviction trigger
steps.instructions: Normalize property, unit, tenant, lease, delinquency_account, balance basis, payment-plan status, dispute flags, prior notice history, owner approval history, and source confidence. Any missing AppFolio or attorney data must be recorded as null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize internal eviction-readiness facts from delinquency workflow output. No resident, owner, attorney, court, or AppFolio action.

steps.title: Review eviction prerequisites
steps.instructions: Review whether the file is legally ready to continue, which facts are missing, and whether attorney review is required before any notice or filing path is drafted.
steps.human_prompt: Review eviction prerequisites before any legal packet or notice draft is staged.

stages.name: Owner And Attorney Gates
stages.description: Capture owner and attorney direction before any legal action is prepared.

steps.title: Stage owner eviction decision packet
steps.instructions: Draft an internal owner decision packet with balance summary, timeline, payment-plan attempts, dispute status, estimated cost, alternatives, and attorney-review recommendation. This is draft-only and must not be sent externally.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft internal owner eviction decision packet only. No external sends.

steps.title: Owner eviction approval
steps.instructions: Capture owner-approved path, hold, payment-plan continuation, or stop. Approval must include source, timestamp, and any spend cap. No legal action may proceed without this gate.
steps.human_prompt: Owner approval required before attorney handoff, notice release, court filing, or resident-facing escalation.

steps.title: Attorney readiness review
steps.instructions: Attorney or authorized legal reviewer confirms the next lawful step, required notices, filing readiness, and any corrected facts. This workflow does not replace legal advice.
steps.human_prompt: Attorney or authorized legal review required before any notice, filing, hearing, set-out, or resident legal communication.

stages.name: Stage Legal Packets
stages.description: Prepare draft-only legal and operations packets after approvals.

steps.title: Assemble attorney handoff packet
steps.instructions: Assemble a draft attorney handoff packet with ledger support, lease, resident contacts, notice history, payment-plan/dispute flags, owner approval, and missing-data notes. Do not send to attorney, resident, owner, court, or AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Assemble draft attorney handoff packet only. No legal filing and no external sends.

steps.title: Stage resident notice draft
steps.instructions: If attorney review requires a notice draft, stage the draft content for human/legal review only. Do not send, serve, post, file, or imply delivery.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage resident notice draft for legal review only. No external send, service, or filing.

steps.title: Legal release gate
steps.instructions: Human/legal approval required before any attorney send, resident notice, court filing, hearing schedule, set-out coordination, or owner update.
steps.human_prompt: Legal release approval required before any eviction-related external action.

stages.name: Track Case Outcome
stages.description: Track legal status, payments, holds, and owner updates after human-approved action occurs outside automation.

steps.title: Track eviction case status
steps.instructions: Track case status, attorney refs, hearing dates if provided, resident payment or cure events, hold/stop decisions, owner update needs, and missing facts. Do not contact anyone or update legal systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Track eviction case status and owner update needs. No external sends and no legal-system writes.

steps.title: Record eviction resolution
steps.instructions: Record resolution as paid, payment plan, dismissed, possession, set-out, write-off, owner stop, or needs_verification, including source and timestamp. Do not post ledger changes or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal eviction resolution metadata. No ledger posting and no AppFolio writes.
